overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through an urban Los Santos neighborhood. The character crosses streets, walks past commercial buildings including a historic theater, and navigates sidewalks lined with fabric stores. The scene features clear sunny weather with light traffic and sparse pedestrians.

events.description: character begins crossing the street from sidewalk to crosswalk

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk then walking across the yellow-striped pedestrian crossing

notable_agents.action: brown SUV driving through the intersection
white van driving away from the intersection

entered.detail: large concrete elevated highway structure spanning across the background
cluster of palm trees at the intersection center island
yellow striped pedestrian crossing markings on asphalt

segments.scene_description: The character stands at a sunlit urban intersection beneath a large highway overpass. Palm trees line the center island as vehicles including a brown SUV pass through. The character steps onto the yellow crosswalk stripes and begins crossing the street.

events.description: character steps onto concrete sidewalk after crossing the street
traffic light changes from red to green for vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past commercial buildings and street furniture

notable_agents.action: woman in pink shirt holding a drink walking in the opposite direction
red sports car parked at the curb

entered.detail: multi-story building with ground floor shops and stone facade
blue postal mailbox on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the character walks along a concrete sidewalk lined with commercial buildings. A woman in a pink shirt walks past in the opposite direction. The highway overpass recedes into the background as the character passes a red parked sports car and a blue mailbox.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic theater district with ornate architecture

events.description: character crosses street toward the large historic theater building
character stops and looks up at the ornate theater building facade

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and pausing to look up at the ornate theater architecture

notable_agents.action: woman in tank top walking along the sidewalk
silver sedan driving past the theater

entered.detail: large ornate stone building with arched windows and decorative classical facade
theater marquee with movie titles displayed
large electronic advertisement screen on building

segments.scene_description: The character crosses another street approaching a prominent historic theater building with ornate stone arches and a movie marquee. After crossing, the character pauses to look up at the architecture while a silver sedan drives past. A digital billboard is visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: fabric store district with colorful material displays

events.description: character turns onto street lined with fabric stores and colorful roll displays
character transitions from walking to running along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking then running along the sidewalk past fabric stores with colorful displays outside

notable_agents.action: older woman in brown top walking ahead on the sidewalk
woman in purple shirt standing near the store entrance

entered.detail: storefront with BROKER signage and colorful vertical fabric rolls displayed outside
wall covered with layered posters and graffiti art
blue banner reading WALL FABRIC hanging above store entrance

segments.scene_description: The character turns onto a street lined with fabric stores, passing colorful rolls of material displayed outside shops with BROKER signage. The character transitions from walking to running past a graffiti-covered wall and scattered trash, heading toward an alley with a WALL FABRIC banner visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit urban neighborhood that shifts from a wide highway intersection to a narrow, commercial street. It begins at a bright crossing beneath a large highway overpass, where the character steps across yellow stripes past palm trees and passing vehicles. As the character moves onto the concrete sidewalk, the overpass recedes into the background while they pass a red sports car and a blue mailbox. The scene then opens up as the character crosses another street to approach a historic theater with ornate stone arches and a movie marquee, pausing briefly as a silver sedan drives by. Finally, the camera follows the character as they turn onto a street lined with fabric stores and colorful materials, transitioning from a walk to a run past a graffiti-covered wall toward a distant alley.
